subcodes.first_line: O thou attracted by the fragrances of the gardens of the Kingdom! I received thy last letter, and, from the inner significances therein mentioned
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات ریاض الملکوت قد اتانی تحریرک الاخیر و ادرکت من معانیها
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @spiritual transformation
